dress_code: Smart Casual (No shorts, t-shirts, tank tops, swimwear, or bare feet)
what_makes_it_unique: Chops Grille is Royal Caribbean's classic steakhouse, known for its premium, hand-cut steaks, fresh seafood, and an elegant, upscale dining experience. It offers a sophisticated atmosphere perfect for a special evening at sea.
warnings: The exact cover charge may vary slightly by ship, itinerary, or booking date.
While Chops Grille is available on nearly all Royal Caribbean ships, the provided list is representative and not exhaustive of every single vessel.
